examples: Does anyone doubt that we live in an age of incivility, of distrust of other cultures?
Society first concern will remain major crime but a foretaste of the seriousness of incivility is suggested by what has been happening in Houston.
He said outsiders like Republican strategist Karl Rove are to blame for any incivility.
Neglect of duty, which together with incivility is classed as "rude and late", rose from 173 to 179.
